item.title: CAVA：代理人工智能系统运行时治理的规范操作验证和证明
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13716v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Agentic AI systems increasingly act through heterogeneous runtimes: local coding hooks, SDK tools, browser automation, managed-agent traces, API gateways, and workflow engines.
